sections.paragraph:
Original: תּנּוּר

Transliteration: tannûr

Phonetic: tan-noor'

BDB Definition:

  1. furnace, oven, fire-pot, (portable) stove
    1. for cooking
    2. of God's wrath, His furnace (figuratively)
    3. of hunger, desire for evil
    4. fire-pot

Origin: from H5216

TWOT entry: 2526

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
